name: Westwood Studios
description: American developer known for The Lion King, the Kyrandia adventure games, Dune II, Command & Conquer, and major real-time strategy work.

eras.title: Adventure and Licensed Era
eras.description: Westwood builds its early identity through adventure games, RPGs, licensed work, and Dune II.

eras.title: Real-Time Strategy Era
eras.description: Command & Conquer and Red Alert define Westwood as one of the key RTS studios before EA closes the studio.
